hooks.command: F=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$F" ] && exit 0; case "$F" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json) bunx biome check --fix --no-errors-on-unmatched "$F" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;; esac; exit 0

description: Impeccable design detector: runs after Edit/Write/apply_patch on UI files and surfaces findings as system reminders.
